name: 男The Heian Era根
description:
DISCLAIMER: IF YOU WANT TO HAVE AN ENJOYABLE TIME, USE GEMINI OR DEEPSEEK, THERE ARE PLENTY OF GUIDES TO TEACH YOU HOW TO USE THEM.

Hello! This is my first Jujutsu kaisen RPG bot, Its an RPG for the heian era, I tried my best to make this bot AS accurate as possible, you can just say "i encountered (character name)" and they will appear, all the characters have a 100% chance of appearing in the roleplay except for 3 cases (Tengen, Kenjaku and Sukuna due to them having such a low chance of activating..) The lorebook is open to see so you know what are the trigger words.

Also, this bot doesnt have many characters as of now, it only has the core heian era characters (Kenjaku, Sukuna, Tengen, Uraume, Uro, Yorozu, Angel) and clans (Sugawara, Zenin, Kamo, Fujiwara, Abe) So I thought of this, what if you give me your JJK oc's that are from the heian era, and I'll input them as special encounters!

Click this form link if you want your character to be inputted into the bot!
https://tally.so/r/mOR0P8

UPD 18/09/25
ADDED 2 new oc's to the definition, made it so that they have a random chance to appear in roleplay. Also added info about Shikigami, and clan inherited techniques. If you have anything you want me to add, just tell me in chat!

UPD 19/09/25
Added even more information with the canon characters because i felt they werent very accurate.

UPD 21/09/25
Optimized a lot of the tokens

UPD 08/11/25
Change how the lorebook works & optimized the tokens even more, Also added a new oc!

UPD 06/4/26
Added Sadastuna Ashiya(The simple domain creator) also added simple domain info.
creator: Ecnivhaley
